desc.en: The Lisbon Metro is an urban rail transit system in Lisbon, the capital of Portugal. It was officially opened on December 29, 1959, and is the first subway system in Portugal. At present, the system has four routes: blue, yellow, green and red, covering the main areas of the city and connecting airports, railway stations and core scenic spots. It is one of the most convenient public transportation methods.
desc.zh-Hans: 里斯本地铁‌是葡萄牙首都里斯本的城市轨道交通系统，于‌1959年12月29日‌正式开通，是葡萄牙首个地铁系统 。目前系统拥有‌蓝、黄、绿、红‌四条线路，覆盖城市主要区域，连接机场、火车站及核心景点，是出行最便捷的公共交通方式之一。
